title: Zosterophyllanthos dubbeldamii
intro: There is not enough information available on Zosterophyllanthos dubbeldamii to provide an accurate description.
taxonomy: Zosterophyllanthos dubbeldamii is classified as a species within the family Podostemaceae, commonly known as riverweed family, which is part of the order Podostemales. It belongs to the family Podostemaceae due to its unique adaptations for living in aquatic environments. Further, this species falls under the order Podostemales, which is a group of flowering plants primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions. Zosterophyllanthos dubbeldamii also belongs to the class Magnoliopsida, which includes flowering plants with two cotyledons and net-veined leaves. As a member of the kingdom Plantae, it shares characteristics with other vascular plants.
